节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

注释信息: @namespace overlay
@syscap SystemCapability.BundleManager.BundleFramework.Overlay
@since 10

节点.功能描述: Set enabled state of overlay module based on specified moduleName.
注释信息: @param { string } moduleName - Indicates the module name of the overlay module to be set.
@param { boolean } isEnabled - The value true means to enable overlay feature, and the value false means to disable overlay feature.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - The callback of setting specified overlay module enabled state result.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700002 - The specified module name is not found.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700033 - The specified module is not an overlay module.
@syscap SystemCapability.BundleManager.BundleFramework.Overlay
@since 10

parameters.说明: Indicates the module name of the overlay module to be set.
The value true means to enable overlay feature, and the value false means to disable overlay feature.
The callback of setting specified overlay module enabled state result.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.
The specified module name is not found.
The specified module is not an overlay module.

节点.功能描述: Set enabled state of overlay module based on specified moduleName.

节点.功能描述: Set enabled state of overlay module based on specified bundleName and moduleName.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.CHANGE_OVERLAY_ENABLED_STATE
@param { string } bundleName - Indicates the application bundle name of the overlay bundle to be set.
@param { string } moduleName - Indicates the module name of the overlay module to be set.
@param { boolean } isEnabled - The value true means to enable overlay feature, and the value false means to disable overlay feature.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - The callback of setting specified overlay module enabled state result.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission denied.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission denied, non-system app called system api.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700001 - The specified bundleName is not found.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700002 - The specified module name is not found.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700032 - The specified bundle does not contain any overlay module.
@throws { BusinessError } 17700033 - The specified module is not an overlay module.
@syscap SystemCapability.BundleManager.BundleFramework.Overlay
@systemapi
@since 10

parameters.说明: Indicates the application bundle name of the overlay bundle to be set.
Indicates the module name of the overlay module to be set.
The value true means to enable overlay feature, and the value false means to disable overlay feature.
The callback of setting specified overlay module enabled state result.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types.
Permission denied, non-system app called system api.
The specified bundleName is not found.
The specified module name is not found.
The specified bundle does not contain any overlay module.
The specified module is not an overlay module.
